adhdTips.label: ADHD Tip
adhdTips.voiceCapture: Use voice capture if typing feels slow today.
adhdTips.breakTasks: Break large tasks into smaller steps — each one should take under 15 minutes.
adhdTips.bodyDouble: Try the focus session feature as a virtual body double.
adhdTips.externalBrain: Locus is your external brain — capture everything, organize later.
